name_en: Chanel 24S Black Gold Wax Leather Fan Chain Bag is truly stunning! Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a piece of art! Double-layer fan bag shape, large capacity, can hold 2 phones 📱, very practical 😄. The large logo design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and nice~ The wax leather is very unique! Feels very durable. Matches any outfit to elevate your elegance 🆙🆙🆙 Size: 18.5 X 14.5
